title: LNURL
description: LNURL is a family of Lightning interaction conventions layered on top of URLs and metadata endpoints. It improves UX but introduces interoperability and trust-surface tradeoffs.

resources.title: Mastering the Lightning Network
resources.notes: Book-length explanation of Lightning channel, routing, and operational tradeoffs tied to this topic.

resources.notes: Implementation commentary and critiques from Lightning developers.
